name: Brittany Mixed Fish Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice crusty French bread.
2. Cut fish into chunks of equal size (flounder, mackerel, cod, or haddock).
3. Sauté onions and garlic in heated butter or margarine in a large kettle until tender.
4. Add potatoes, water, bay leaves, thyme, marjoram, parsley, salt, and pepper to the kettle.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add prepared fish and lower heat to moderate.
7. Cook, covered, for about 25 minutes or until fish and potatoes are tender. Discard bay leaves.
8. Serve fish and potatoes separately on a platter; place slices of bread in wide soup plates. Ladle broth over the bread.
Serves 6 to 8.
